My Story

The Journey

From ₹12,000/month to funded trader
2022

The ₹12K Job

Low-paying job, unfulfilling work. Started studying ICT on my phone during metro commutes and office breaks.

2023

The Setback

Found CFD firms, invested 2-3 months of effort and money. The firm shut down and disappeared with everything.

2023

Discovered Futures

Regulated exchanges, real clearing houses, actual payouts. Started from zero again with a new approach.

3 yrs

The Grind

Blown accounts, sleepless nights, people telling me trading doesn't work. But the concepts slowly clicked.

Now

$150K+ Paid Out

25+ funded accounts, verified payouts, sharing the process so you can skip the trial-and-error phase.

I was making ₹12,000 a month at a job I hated. That's barely enough to cover rent in any city worth living in. Every morning I'd squeeze into the Delhi metro, earphones in, watching ICT videos on my phone while the train swayed.


During breaks at work I'd watch trading videos. My colleagues noticed. They kept telling me — "these things don't work, you can't change your life like this." Everyone around me thought I was wasting my time. But I kept going.


I found CFD firms first — thought I'd found my way out. Spent 2-3 months pouring everything I had into it. Money, time, hope. Then one morning the firm shut down overnight. Gone. Every rupee with it. No explanation, no refund, nothing. Just a dead website.


But I didn't stop. I found futures trading — regulated exchanges, real clearing houses, actual payouts. I started from zero again. New platform, new rules, new everything.


The next 3 years were brutal. Blown accounts. Sleepless nights. Moments where I questioned everything. But somewhere in that grind, the concepts clicked. The order blocks started making sense. The entries got cleaner.


Today I manage 25+ funded accounts, I've been paid out over $150,000, and the numbers on this page are real — verified, documented, mine. Not to flex. But to show you that if a guy making twelve thousand rupees a month can figure this out, you can too.

Simplest Rules
Beginner-friendly evaluation

Get This Deal
★ = RECOMMENDED · ALL PRICES AFTER CODE ABHI
01Evaluation (Eval)▾
Think of it like a driving test. Before a prop firm gives you real money to trade with, they want to see if you can drive without crashing. You trade on a practice account, and if you hit the profit goal without losing too much, you "pass" and get a funded account.
Example: Apex gives you a $50,000 practice account. Make $3,000 in profit without losing more than $2,500 — and you're in.
02Profit Target▾
The score you need to pass the test. It's the total profit you need to make during your evaluation.
Example: Target is $3,000. You make $500 on Monday, $800 Tuesday, $1,700 Wednesday — that's $3,000. You passed.
03Trailing Drawdown (EOD vs Intraday)▾
Imagine you're climbing a mountain with a bungee cord tied to your waist — $2,500 long. As you climb higher, the bottom follows you up. But it NEVER goes back down.

EOD: Cord checks your height once at end of day. Easier to manage.
Intraday: Cord watches every second. Touched $5,000 for a moment? The cord moved from there.
What happensHighest pointDeath lineRoom left
Start: $50,000$50,000$47,500$2,500
Day 1: Make $1,000$51,000$48,500$2,500
Day 3: Lose $800Still $51,500Still $49,000Only $1,700
Day 4: Lose $1,700Still $51,500Still $49,000💀 Done.
Key: The death line only moves UP. Every dollar you make tightens the rope.
04Daily Loss Limit (DLL)▾
The maximum amount you're allowed to lose in a single day.
Example: DLL is $1,000. You lose $1,001 today — account breached, even if you were up $5,000 overall.

Firms like Lucid have NO DLL — only the total drawdown matters.
05Profit Split▾
How the money gets divided when you withdraw. The first number is yours.
Example: 90/10 = you keep 90%. Made $1,000? You get $900.
Apex gives 100% — you keep everything.
06Activation Fee▾
A one-time fee paid AFTER passing the evaluation to activate your funded account.
Example: Apex charges $99 activation fee after you pass.
Lucid and MFF charge $0 — start trading immediately.
07Consistency Rule▾
No single day can represent more than a set % of your total profit at payout time.
DayProfit% of TotalStatus
Monday$1,50050%❌ Breaks 30%
Tue–Fri$1,500—✓
Total$3,000
Biggest Day ÷ 0.30 = Minimum Total Needed  ·  $1,500 ÷ 0.30 = $5,000
08Buffer & Payout Cap▾
Buffer: Profit you must build up before your first payout. Payout cap: max you can withdraw in a single request.
MFF Rapid buffer: $2,100 first. After that, withdraw daily with no cap.
MFF Flex: No buffer — withdraw after 5 profitable days. Cap: $5,000/request.
Apex first payout: $1,500 cap.
